title: Majestic Ghasts X Fresh Animations
description: Makes Happy Ghast Majestic And Have COOL COSTUMES WHILE BEING COMPATIBLE WITH FRESH ANIMATIONS!!!
body:
HI!!I'm **Nyly** and this is a resource pack that adds cute Happy GHASTS!!And...ADDS CUTE COUSTUMES _XD_ also makes it compatible with **Fresh Animations**!!!**This is the first of its kind so i hope everyebody enjoys it no ghasts galore only changes the colors** _~~SO~~_
**Props to abemiscape and DapperLoosh for their **COOL** idk how to say this uhh...help? Also Thanks To Anyone who downloads this pack and anyone who reads this _Description_**
